title: antidesma riparium
intro: Antidesma riparium, also known as the river mangrove or swamp mangrove, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Antidesma riparium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
